text.message: 6 paths are you on YouTube or in tourneys idk why your name sounds familiar

u need wood though so pleasure doing business
kinda useless without brick but yea

why are you offering it lol
yes Ill take insurance what do u want back though
just give me a free card
i was distracted and messed up my placements
can u give me insurance red
then u owe me sheep back
wait we r even though now right
if i had i would do
if thats whats best for you
8s gonna be the end of me though
if you want to do sheep for wood
ok I have wood for u

ill port if you dont want

who is deving against black though

ik but they are much further ahead than yall
im saying we shouldnt be doing
so those were great deals for him

but you get road and settle

whereas whoever gets army cooks us

so u can def feed if he needs it

well u haven't been blocking him at all
I think 8 sheep is better for u
ill give u stuff if it makes a difference
I have wood and sheep if u need red

up to you if u want it

like u need to be blocking them red I will trade anything
